name: Salmon Fillet with Dilled Potatoes
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 pounds new potatoes, cut into 1/4-inch slices
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare the salad: In a large bowl, stir together sour cream, yogurt, mustard, dill, salt, and pepper. Cook potatoes in a pot of water for 10 minutes until tender. Add spinach and cook for 2 more minutes. Drain well, then add to the dressing and fold into the bowl.
2. Prepare the salmon: Preheat grill or broiler. Spread each fillet with mustard and sprinkle evenly with salt, pepper, and dill. Drizzle oil over the fillets.
3. Grill or broil salmon 4 to 6 inches from heat for 8 to 10 minutes, until cooked through. Remove from heat and let stand for 5 minutes before serving with dilled potatoes.
